name: Sensor type
description: Sensor hardware category drawn from the SensorType collection.

name: Observes property
description: ObservableProperty concepts this sensor can measure (water level, wind speed, PGA, temperature, PM2.5, head count). Repeatable.

name: Deployed at
description: Site resource where the sensor is physically deployed.

name: Deployment time-span
description: Time-span during which the sensor is / was deployed.

name: Deployment start
description: Earliest date the sensor was in place.

name: Deployment end
description: Latest date the sensor was in place (blank = still deployed).
